evals.prompt: I need to run parallel ML experiments with 4 agents on different hyperparameter configurations
evals.expected_output: Uses clawteam spawn to create 4 worker agents, each assigned different hyperparameter configs, with task dependency tracking and clawteam monitor for progress

evals.prompt: Spawn a full-stack development team to build a REST API
evals.expected_output: Uses clawteam template fullstack or spawns specialized workers: api-designer, backend-dev, frontend-dev, test-engineer with task dependencies
assertions: clawteam template fullstack or manual spawn used
clawteam board or monitor for progress tracking

evals.prompt: How do I check what my ClawTeam agents are working on right now?
evals.expected_output: Provides clawteam status and clawteam board commands with team name parameter

evals.prompt: Set up ClawTeam to analyze TSLA stock with multiple specialist agents
evals.expected_output: Uses clawteam template hedge-fund with --ticker TSLA, or manually spawns growth/technical/fundamental/sentiment/risk analyst agents
assertions: hedge-fund template or manual spawn used

evals.prompt: Install and set up ClawTeam for the first time
evals.expected_output: pip install clawteam, clawteam doctor to verify setup, explains tmux requirement and compatible agents
